plugins.name: investigating-datadog
plugins.description: Query Datadog logs, metrics, monitors, hosts, events, and APM traces for debugging and investigation.

plugins.name: managing-confluence
plugins.description: Manage Confluence Cloud pages via REST API — create, read, update, delete pages, manage attachments, and search content.

plugins.name: managing-jira
plugins.description: Interact with Jira via Atlassian CLI — create, search, and manage tickets, projects, boards, and sprints.

plugins.name: reflecting-on-skills
plugins.description: Analyze skill usage after each invocation and suggest improvements via PostToolUse hook-driven self-reflection.

plugins.name: suggesting-skills
plugins.description: Analyze Claude Code sessions to identify repeated patterns and suggest new skills based on usage.

plugins.name: summarize-meeting
plugins.description: Generate comprehensive meeting summaries from Zoom recordings — frame extraction, transcript processing, and chat analysis.

plugins.name: writing-skills
plugins.description: Guide for authoring well-structured Agent Skills — SKILL.md structure, naming conventions, and best practices.
